display.purpose: Welcome hero titles and first-run surfaces only.

headline.purpose: Shell titles, major panel headings, and onboarding sections.

title.purpose: Cards, setting groups, agent chips, and compact headings.

body.purpose: Chat-adjacent prose, setting descriptions, tutorials, and explanatory copy.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, metadata, counters, and compact status labels.

mono.purpose: Logs, regex, prompt snippets, token diagnostics, and structured output.

shadows.name: shell-shadow
shadows.purpose: Large shell panels and major overlay surfaces.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Welcome action cards, selected theme options, and medium interactive cards.

shadows.name: control-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover and focus confirmation on buttons, icon controls, and active utility controls.

motion.name: fast-state
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and active-state feedback.

motion.name: standard-state
motion.purpose: Shell reveal and medium component transitions.

motion.name: slow-state
motion.purpose: Rare slow transitions, never routine product navigation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Warm action button for primary confirmation and launch actions.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 38px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 88%, #f4f1df 12%); color: var(--sb-on-accent, #050607); font: 700 14px/1.2 Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 82%, #f4f1df 18%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 34%, transparent), inset 0 -2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, #050607 12%, transparent); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default tonal button for repeated shell and settings actions.
components.css: .ds-button-ghost { min-height: 38px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-border, #050607) 80%, transparent); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--sb-button-bg, #1d2128); color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); font: 700 14px/1.2 Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-button-ghost:hover { background: var(--sb-button-hover, #393d41); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 18%, transparent); } .ds-button-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Stable field treatment for search, prompts, settings, and compact forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); font-family: Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; } .ds-field span { font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sb-muted-fg, #999992); } .ds-input { min-height: 46px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--sb-input-border, #050607); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--sb-input-bg, #1d2128); color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); font: 400 15px/1.45 Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5) 60%, transparent); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 85%, transparent); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 35%, transparent); }

components.name: Shell Tab
components.description: Workspace and Customize navigation tab with icon, label, and active state.
components.css: .ds-shell-tab { min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 14px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; background: transparent; color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); font-family: Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-shell-tab svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; opacity: 0.82; } .ds-shell-tab span { display: grid; gap: 2px; text-align: left; } .ds-shell-tab strong { font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-shell-tab small { font-size: 10.8px; line-height: 1.35; opacity: 0.74; } .ds-shell-tab:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-button-hover, #393d41) 52%, transparent); } .ds-shell-tab.is-active { background: var(--sb-shell-tab-active-bg, #2f3238); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-border, #050607) 85%, transparent); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-border, #050607) 78%, transparent), inset 0 -2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 34%, transparent); } .ds-shell-tab:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Theme Option
components.description: Selectable card used for shell style and compact settings choices.
components.css: .ds-theme-option { width: 220px; padding: 14px 14px 16px; display: grid; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-border, #050607) 84%, transparent); border-radius: 16px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-main-bg, #1d2128) 84%, transparent); color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); text-align: left; font-family: Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease; } .ds-theme-option strong { font-size: 12.3px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-theme-option span { font-size: 11.1px; line-height: 1.45; opacity: 0.74; } .ds-theme-option:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-theme-option.is-selected { background: var(--sb-shell-tab-active-bg, #2f3238); box-shadow: 0 14px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeShadowColor, #050607) 16%, transparent); } .ds-theme-option:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Welcome Action Card
components.description: Home and onboarding shortcut card that keeps the creative surface friendly.
components.html: Open AssistantAsk for help in plain language.
components.css: .ds-welcome-card { width: 260px; min-height: 88px; padding: 12px 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-shell-border, #050607) 86%, transparent); border-radius: 20px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBlurTintColor, #1d2128) 92%, var(--SmartThemeChatTintColor, #1d2128) 8%); color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 14px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeShadowColor, #050607) 12%, transparent); font-family: Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-welcome-card svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #c9c6a8) 64%, var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5)); flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-welcome-card span { display: grid; gap: 5px; text-align: center; } .ds-welcome-card strong { font-size: 13.8px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-welcome-card small { font-size: 11.1px; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--sb-muted-fg, #999992); } .ds-welcome-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 18px 32px color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeShadowColor, #050607) 16%, transparent); } .ds-welcome-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 60%, transparent), 0 14px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeShadowColor, #050607) 12%, transparent); }

components.name: Agent Quick Chip
components.description: Compact in-chat agent control chip for enabling, pinning, and applying helper prompts.
components.css: .ds-agent-chip { min-width: 220px; padding: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBorderColor, #050607) 42%, transparent); border-radius: 14px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBlurTintColor, #1d2128) 28%, transparent); color: var(--SmartThemeBodyColor, #cfcfc5); font-family: Figtree, Noto Sans, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-agent-chip.is-enabled { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeQuoteColor, #c9c6a8) 52%, transparent); background: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeQuoteColor, #c9c6a8) 12%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBlurTintColor, #1d2128) 26%, transparent)); } .ds-agent-status { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeQuoteColor, #c9c6a8) 18%, transparent); color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeQuoteColor, #c9c6a8) 80%, #f4f1df 20%); font-weight: 700; } .ds-agent-chip span:last-child { display: grid; gap: 2px; text-align: left; } .ds-agent-chip strong { font-size: 13.8px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-agent-chip small { font-size: 10.2px; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.64; } .ds-agent-chip:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--SmartThemeBorderColor, #050607) 18%, transparent); } .ds-agent-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--sb-focus-ring, #c9c6a8) 70%, transparent); }

narrative.overview:
SillyBunny should feel like a creative control room for roleplay and storytelling: expressive enough to invite imagination, structured enough to keep the writer in flow, and practical enough to carry the full SillyTavern surface without making the first screen feel like a cockpit. The system uses warm signals against charcoal panels, rounded tactile controls, and atmospheric depth that helps separate chat, shell, onboarding, and agent work.

The product must preserve the PRODUCT.md line: "Express personality through usefulness." Personality belongs in onboarding, assistant surfaces, launchpad cards, and creative workflow affordances. Settings, API setup, presets, sampling, and server tools stay familiar, predictable, and compact.

This system rejects needless complexity, generic SaaS polish, sterile upstream-clone blandness, hover-only discovery, tiny touch targets, and browser behavior that breaks on iOS WebKit.
keyCharacteristics: Creative product UI, not a marketing surface.
Dark charcoal default with warm signal accents and user-adjustable themes.
Layered atmospheric panels: tonal surfaces first, restrained shadows second.
Tactile and clear controls with stable dimensions and mobile-safe hit areas.
Progressive complexity through shell panels, global search, compact mode, and launchpad guidance.

rules.name: The Warm Signal Rule
rules.body: Warm Signal is for action, current selection, focus, and meaningful state. If it is being used as decoration, remove it.

rules.name: The Theme-Compatible Rule
rules.body: SillyBunny themes use `SmartTheme*` and `sb-*` CSS variables. New colors must flow through those variables or documented semantic aliases, not hard-coded one-off values.

rules.name: The No Pure Extremes Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce new pure black or pure white surfaces. Tint darks toward the charcoal system and lights toward the linen system.

rules.name: The Interface Sans Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display fonts for controls, labels, tabs, or dense setting surfaces. The tool should stay readable under pressure.

rules.name: The No Viewport Type Rule
rules.body: Product UI type should scale from `--mainFontSize` and user settings, not from viewport width.

rules.name: The Layer Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Add tonal separation before adding a stronger shadow. If a shadow is doing all the work, the surface token is wrong.

rules.name: The WebKit Reliability Rule
rules.body: On mobile and Safari surfaces, prefer solid or near-solid layers over fragile blur stacks. Depth must never break scrolling, focus, safe areas, or fixed positioning.

dos: Do keep the default path simple first and powerful nearby.
Do use Warm Signal for current selection, focus, meaningful state, and primary action only.
Do preserve creative flow between chat, characters, presets, world info, personas, and agents.
Do test mobile layouts with iOS WebKit constraints in mind: safe areas, fixed layers, focus behavior, scroll containers, and touch targets.
Do route new visual work through existing `SmartTheme*`, `sb-*`, `color-*`, spacing, and radius tokens.
Do keep controls tactile and clear, with default, hover, focus, active, disabled, and loading or empty states where relevant.
donts: Don't make the interface feel complex for its own sake.
Don't ship dense control walls on default surfaces, gratuitous advanced settings, or novelty interactions that slow repeated chat work.
Don't create generic SaaS polish, sterile upstream-clone blandness, or showcase-style visual treatments.
Don't hide essential writing controls behind mystery meat navigation.
Don't rely on desktop-only assumptions, hover-only discovery, tiny touch targets, or browser behavior that breaks on iOS WebKit.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than `1px` as a colored accent on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't add gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, identical repeated card grids, or modal-first flows.
Don't introduce pure black or pure white as new surface colors. Use tinted charcoal and linen neutrals.
